failedAssertions.reason: Cardinality labels not clearly present as text markers.
Domain extraction flow does not update the map slot consumed by /er/, preventing live or refresh-based updates from Act 2 progression.
Knowledge data is present, but changelog evidence does not span all acts (only build/task entries), and pipeline status does not indicate a completed full pipeline.
Active nav works but ER content is not on /domain/.
Console regression on /build/ violates no-errors expectation.
Responsive layout is present; required ER content is absent on /domain/.
Demo 9-entity precondition not present in current runtime.
Expected demo relationship pairs not present.
Explicit cardinality label requirement not met.
Act 2 extraction response is not reflected in the ER page data source (/api/map/solution/domain), so ER remains empty.
Contract-specified ER endpoints are not implemented on this API surface; required entity/relationship paths returned 404.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Missing relationship-type preconditions in runtime data.

appliedUpdates.description: Added er-diagram round-1 validation notes about /domain vs /er surface split, ER endpoint path mismatch, Act2->ER data propagation gap, and /build console error check.
